message:
feat(mermaid): add render_diff for visual diagram diffing (bd-1565j)

Implement render_diff() that renders diagram diffs with color-coded
highlighting: green (added), yellow (changed), dim gray (unchanged),
and a red legend footer for removed nodes/edges. Includes DiffColors
constants, DiffViewport for coordinate mapping, and 6 new tests.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
